videos.headline: Jordan Travis goes off in Florida State's statement win over LSU
videos.description: Jordan Travis throws for four touchdowns and rushes for another in Florida State's big win over LSU.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Jordan Travis goes off in Florida State's statement win over LSU) 2023/09/03 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Florida State's goal-line stand keeps LSU off the board
videos.description: Florida State's DJ Lundy sacks LSU's Jayden Daniels on 4th-and-goal in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Florida State's goal-line stand keeps LSU off the board) 2023/9/3 ESHEET

videos.headline: FSU's Keon Coleman sheds multiple defenders on 40-yard TD
videos.description: Jordan Travis connects with Keon Coleman for a 40-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (FSU's Keon Coleman sheds multiple defenders on 40-yard TD) 2023/9/3 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU scores TD after 33-yard 1st down
videos.description: Jayden Daniels finds Kyren Lacy on the edge of the sideline for a first down. Tre Bradford scores a touchdown on the next play.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (LSU scores TD after 33-yard 1st down) 2023/9/3 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jayden Daniels gets laid out by FSU LB while hurdling
videos.description: Florida State linebacker Tatum Bethune lays out Jayden Daniels after the LSU quarterback tries to hurdle defenders.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Jayden Daniels gets laid out by FSU LB while hurdling) 2023/9/3 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU and FSU exchange turnovers
videos.description: Immediately after muffing a punt return, LSU picks off Jordan Travis to get the ball back.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (LSU and FSU exchange turnovers) 2023/9/3 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jayden Daniels' big run sets up LSU TD
videos.description: Jayden Daniels' 40-yard run sets up a Noah Cain touchdown for LSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Jayden Daniels' big run sets up LSU TD) 2023/9/3 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida State improvises trick play to convert a first down
videos.description: FSU wide receiver Deuce Spann scrambles under pressure and passes 17 yards to Johnny Wilson for the first down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Florida State improvises trick play to convert a first down) 2023/9/3 ESHEET

videos.headline: Lawrance Toafili's 41-yard reception leads to a Jordan Travis TD
videos.description: Jordan Travis finds Lawrance Toafili on fourth down for a 41-yard reception that leads to a Travis touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Lawrance Toafili's 41-yard reception leads to a Jordan Travis TD) 2023/9/3 ESHEET

videos.headline: Keon Coleman scores 3rd TD in 1st game as a Seminole
videos.description: Jordan Travis finds Keon Coleman in the back corner of the end zone for Coleman's third touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Keon Coleman scores 3rd TD in 1st game as a Seminole) 2023/9/3 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan Travis waves at LSU fans after 5th TD
videos.description: Jordan Travis throws up a 44-yard touchdown to Jaheim Bell, then waves goodbye to LSU fans in the crowd.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Jordan Travis waves at LSU fans after 5th TD) 2023/9/3 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jayden Daniels and Brian Thomas connect for 75-yard TD
videos.description: Jayden Daniels airs it out to Brian Thomas for a last-ditch effort at cutting LSU's deficit against FSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jayden Daniels and Brian Thomas connect for 75-yard TD) 2023/09/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaheim Bell rushes for 2nd TD of the game
videos.description: FSU punches in another touchdown in the fourth after Jaheim Bell rushes four yards into the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaheim Bell rushes for 2nd TD of the game) 2023/09/03 ESHEET
